name: Commercial chatbot (Next.js)
description: Like ai-chatbot: Next.js chatbot, NOT open source, risk unclear. is_chatbot=true, generates synthetic text, no AI disclosure, no watermarking. Art.50 should be non_compliant.

art5.legal_basis: Art. 5(1): no prohibited practices detected — all 4 categories checked with high confidence

art6.legal_basis: Art. 6(1)-(2): risk classification unclear (is_high_risk=null) — cannot determine if Annex I product or Annex III category applies

art9.legal_basis: Art. 9(1)-(9): risk management system required for all AI systems placed on EU market; has_risk_docs=false, no risk management evidence found

art10.legal_basis: Art. 10(1)-(6): data governance measures required; has_data_governance_doc=false, has_bias_mitigation=false, has_data_lineage=false

art11.legal_basis: Art. 11(1): technical documentation required before placing on market; has_technical_docs=false, no documentation found

art12.legal_basis: Art. 12(1)-(4): automatic recording of events (logging) required; has_logging=false, no logging infrastructure found

art13.legal_basis: Art. 13(1)-(3): transparency and instructions for use required; has_explainability=false, has_transparency_info=false

art14.legal_basis: Art. 14(1)-(5): human oversight measures required; has_human_oversight=false, has_override_mechanism=false

art15.legal_basis: Art. 15(1)-(5): accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity required; has_accuracy_testing=false, has_robustness_testing=false

art50.legal_basis: Art. 50(1): chatbot system must disclose AI interaction to users; is_chatbot_or_interactive_ai=true but has_ai_disclosure_to_users=null, no disclosure evidence. Art. 50(2): generates synthetic content but has_content_watermarking=false
